name: Davey Havok
description:
'''David Paden Marchand''' (born '''David Paden Passaro''', November 20, 1975), known professionally as '''Davey Havok''', is an American singer  who is the lead vocalist of the [[Rock music|rock]] band [[AFI (band)|AFI]], the [[synth-pop]] band [[Blaqk Audio]], the [[hardcore punk]] band [[XTRMST]], and the [[New wave music|new wave]] band [[Dreamcar]]. Among various other ventures, he performed lead vocals for [[Son of Sam (band)|Son of Sam]]'s [[Songs from the Earth|debut album]] and for fictional band My Purple Agony in the animated series ''[[Harvey Girls Forever!]]''.

Havok is an advocate of the [[straight edge]] lifestyle and [[veganism]].
